recommendations.reason: Dense concrete canopy and low tree shade have spiked daytime land surface temperatures by 4.2°C. Grid power load is near critical capacity due to HVAC overloads.
recommendations.policy: Mandatory cool-roof retrofitting for all commercial spaces above 5,000 sq ft, and deployment of 3 mini-parks in parking lots.

recommendations.reason: High population density but stable residential greening helps buffer extreme heat. Main risk is localized heat entrapment near tech hubs.
recommendations.policy: Urban forestry corridors linking existing parks and subsidies for green wall installations on commercial high-rises.

recommendations.reason: Industrial zone with expansive asphalt pavements and asphalt roof sheets. Tree coverage is at an alarming 8%. Hospital admissions for heat stroke have doubled in 72 hours.
recommendations.policy: Immediate deployment of smart misting fans along labor transit corridors and 50% industrial rooftop solar shading incentives.

recommendations.reason: Excellent tree canopy coverage provides natural cooling. Microclimate is 3.5°C cooler than industrial blocks. Grid capacity is highly stable.
recommendations.policy: Community tree conservation schemes and maintenance of existing smart public drinking fountains.

recommendations.reason: Moderate tree cover but high density of senior citizens. Temperature is buffered by heritage parks but high risk of heatstroke in non-air-conditioned older homes.
recommendations.policy: Opening of 2 community cooling centers in public libraries and active monitoring of geriatric populations by health workers.

recommendations.reason: Proximity to Hebbal Lake helps lower evening temperatures. Moderate green belts. Main hazard is high-rise heat trap wind blocking.
recommendations.policy: Enforce wind corridor designs on upcoming vertical residential designs and preserve water body wetlands.

recommendations.reason: Dense market zones, heavy pedestrian traffic, and virtual absence of tree cover. Heavy concrete load storage raises nighttime temperatures.
recommendations.policy: Establishment of cooling shelters at bus hubs and installation of solar-reflective pergolas above walking lanes.
